content.scenarioHint: 朋友见面时，想自然地开启关于对方最近社交媒体活动的闲聊话题
content.speakerText: Hey, haven't seen any new posts from you lately—what’s up? Been on Instagram or switched to something else?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，最近都没看到你发新动态了，怎么了？还在用Instagram，还是换别的平台了？
expectedAnswers: I’ve been posting on TikTok more—it’s just more fun these days.
Actually, I took a break to focus on real life. No more scrollin’!
Yeah, I’ve been posting a bit! Check out my food pics last week.
I’m kinda ghosting social media for now—too much drama.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确询问了对方最近的社交媒体活动
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确，无严重错误
表达自然度：是否使用了口语化、自然的表达方式（如缩写、俚语）
关键词覆盖：是否包含社交媒体相关词（如 Instagram, TikTok, posts, scroll）

content.speakerText: What’s up? Any new posts on your feed?
content.speakerTextCn: 最近怎么样？你的动态有发新东西吗？
expectedAnswers: Not much, just posting cute cat videos now.
I’ve been offline for a week — needed to unplug.
I started posting on Pinterest — it’s way more chill than Instagram.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了关于社交媒体动态的询问
语言准确性：是否正确使用现在完成时、口语缩写和自然表达
表达自然度：语气是否轻松、有个性，避免机械或生硬
关键词覆盖：是否使用了post, feed, offline, unplug, Instagram 等关键词
